Open Source · Apache 2.0

The smarter way to share
knowledge

Scoold is a self-hosted Q&A platform, forum, and knowledge base built for teams and enterprises. Deploy on-premises or to any cloud — fully under your control.

FEATURES

Everything your team needs to
succeed

Packed with powerful features designed to help your team capture, organize, and share knowledge effectively.

Full-text Search

Every question, answer, and comment is indexed for fast, accurate search. Find knowledge in seconds, not hours.

Enterprise SSO

LDAP, SAML 2.0, and SCIM support for seamless integration with your existing identity provider and directory.

Reputation & Badges

Built-in gamification with reputation points, achievement badges, and leaderboards to incentivize participation.

On-Premises Deploy

Keep your data in your own infrastructure. Deploy as a Docker container, JAR, or to any cloud provider.

REST API

Full-featured REST API for integrations, custom automations, and embedding Scoold content in your existing tools.

Multi-space Support

Create separate spaces for different teams, departments, or projects — all from a single Scoold instance. (Pro)

View all features
BUILT FOR TEAMS

We build tools that empower knowledge workers

Focused on a mission to eliminate knowledge silos, we've built a platform that transforms how teams capture, share, and find information — without the subscription fatigue.

  • Deployed on your own infrastructure — your data, your rules
  • One-time licensing. No per-seat fees, no monthly surprises
  • Built-in search, reputation, and SSO from day one
  • Open source core, with enterprise features in Pro
10+ yrs

99.9%
Uptime (Pro)
24/7

SOLUTIONS

One platform, many use cases

Whether you need a developer knowledge base, a community forum, or a customer support portal — Scoold adapts to your needs.

Knowledge Base

Searchable institutional knowledge for your whole team.

Learn more
Community Forum

Build a thriving community around your product or project.

Learn more
Developer Hub

The engineering team's permanent home for technical Q&A.

Learn more
Support Center

Reduce ticket volume with searchable self-service answers.

Learn more
Q&A Platform

Stack Overflow-style Q&A running on your own infrastructure.

Learn more
Knowledge Sharing

Break down silos and create a culture of sharing.

Learn more
PRICING

Simple, transparent pricing

No subscriptions. No per-seat fees. A one-time license that's yours forever.

Community

Everything you need to get started. Self-hosted, open source, Apache 2.0.

forever

MOST POPULAR

Scoold Pro

The complete enterprise package. LDAP, SAML, SCIM, multi-space, and priority support.

€499
one-time license
Buy Pro License
  • Everything in Community
  • LDAP / Active Directory
  • SAML 2.0 SSO
  • SCIM user provisioning
  • Multi-space support
  • Analytics & reports
  • White-labeling & custom domain
  • Priority email support
  • High-availability clustering
  • Unlimited users

Pro + Source

Full Pro features plus complete access to the Scoold Pro source code.

€1,499
one-time license
Contact Sales
  • Everything in Scoold Pro
  • Full source code access
  • Custom feature development
  • Dedicated Slack channel
  • Architecture consulting
  • SLA guarantee

All plans include free updates for 12 months. Pro licenses valid for unlimited users on a single production instance.

Compare all features
FAQ

Frequently asked questions

Everything you need to know about Scoold. Can't find the answer you're looking for? Reach out to our support team.

Scoold is an open-source Q&A and knowledge base platform licensed under Apache 2.0. It's completely free and self-hosted. Scoold Pro is a commercial edition that adds enterprise features like LDAP, SAML SSO, SCIM provisioning, multi-space support, analytics, and priority support. Both share the same core codebase.

Absolutely. Scoold is designed for self-hosted deployment. You can run it as a Docker container, a standalone JAR, or deploy it to AWS, Azure, GCP, or any other cloud provider. Your data never leaves your infrastructure.

Scoold Pro supports SAML 2.0 SSO with any compliant identity provider, including Okta, Azure Active Directory, Auth0, OneLogin, Ping Identity, and Google Workspace. LDAP and Active Directory integration is also available for on-premises environments.

Scoold Pro uses a one-time perpetual license model. You pay once (€499) and own the license forever with no per-seat or subscription fees. The license covers a single production instance with unlimited users. Updates are free for 12 months.

Yes! You can try the live demo at demo.scoold.com — no account required. The Community edition is also free to download and run locally, so you can evaluate the full platform before purchasing Pro.

Still have questions?

Can't find the answer you're looking for? Our support team is here to help.

Contact support

Ready to build your team's knowledge base?

Join thousands of organizations using Scoold to capture and share knowledge effectively. Start free, scale when you're ready.
